User.title: User
User.description: User profile document synchronized from Firebase Auth.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier for the user.

provider.description: The authentication provider used (e.g. google, email).

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A deliverable task created by the user with deadlines and effort estimations.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns this task.

estimatedEffort.description: Estimated time to complete the task in minutes.

category.description: Category or tag for grouping tasks (e.g. Work, Personal).

status.description: Current progress status of the task.

subtasks.description: List of smaller nested subtasks with their completion status.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

ScheduleItem.title: ScheduleItem
ScheduleItem.description: An allocation of time in the daily schedule for working on a task.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns this schedule item.

taskId.description: The ID of the task this schedule item relates to.

aiNote.description: AI recommendation or insight regarding this time block.

availableHoursPerDay.description: Number of productive hours available per day.

workingHoursStart.description: Preferred starting hour for focus blocks (HH:MM).

workingHoursEnd.description: Preferred ending hour for focus blocks (HH:MM).

ActivityLogItem.title: ActivityLogItem
ActivityLogItem.description: Historical record of user actions and automated workspace events.

userId.description: UID of the user associated with this action.

taskTitle.description: Title of the task relevant to the action.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the activity log entry.

users/{userId}.description: User profiles stored by authenticated UID.

tasks/{taskId}.description: Tasks created and owned by users.

schedule/{scheduleId}.description: Scheduled intervals and daily planning slots linked to tasks.

userPrefs/{userId}.description: Productivity and workspace hour preferences for users.

activityLog/{logId}.description: Automated logs tracking completed, created, or missed tasks.
